overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing Batman gliding through a foggy, neon-lit Gotham City at night. The character descends from a high rooftop past a vertical hotel sign, over police cars on the street below, and lands on a ledge near a large digital billboard displaying the Joker's face.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop perch overlooking city street

events.description: Batman initiates glide from stationary rooftop perch, beginning descent toward street level

agents.ego_description: Batman starts perched on a high rooftop, then initiates a glide down toward the street below, passing the illuminated hotel sign

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign spelling HOTEL in bright orange letters attached to building facade
ornate gothic architecture building with spires and detailed stonework visible in the distance
industrial metal girders and framework overhead suggesting a bridge or elevated structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Batman perched on a high Gotham City rooftop at night, with a prominent vertical neon hotel sign glowing on the right. The atmosphere is foggy and dark, illuminated by artificial city lights. Batman initiates his glide, beginning a descent toward the street far below.

events.description: Police cars with flashing lights become visible on the street below as Batman descends

agents.ego_description: Batman continues gliding downward, revealing the street level with police vehicles patrolling below

notable_agents.action: police cars with flashing red and blue lights driving along the street below

entered.detail: multiple police vehicles with flashing emergency lights visible on the street below
ornate stone building with gothic architectural details at street corner

segments.scene_description: As Batman glides lower, the perspective opens up to reveal the city street below with police cars patrolling. The hotel sign recedes into the distance on the right while gothic buildings frame the left side. The descent continues through the foggy night air toward street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to building with large digital display

events.description: Large digital billboard displaying the Joker's face comes into view on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: Batman glides toward a target building featuring a massive digital billboard, preparing to land

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying a close-up of the Joker's face with white makeup and red lips
gothic building exterior with ledges and architectural details approaching as landing target
bright red neon signage with asian characters visible near the Joker billboard

segments.scene_description: The glide continues toward a building featuring a prominent digital billboard displaying the Joker's menacing face. Red neon signs become visible as Batman approaches the landing zone, while the street and police cars fall away into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: building ledge with digital billboard overlook

events.description: Batman lands on the building ledge and comes to a stop, perching near the Joker billboard

agents.ego_description: Batman lands gracefully on a building ledge next to the Joker billboard and assumes a stationary perch position

entered.detail: concrete ledge with gothic architectural details where Batman lands and perches

segments.scene_description: Batman completes his glide by landing on a building ledge right next to the massive Joker billboard. The camera settles into a stationary position overlooking the cityscape, with the Joker's face prominently displayed on the left and distant city lights visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a high, foggy rooftop down to a neon-lit building ledge in the heart of Gotham City. It begins with Batman perched atop a skyscraper beside a glowing vertical hotel sign before he launches into a glide toward the dark streets below. As he descends, the hotel sign recedes and the perspective opens to reveal patrolling police cars and gothic architecture framing the foggy night air. The scene then shifts toward a building adorned with red neon signs and a massive digital billboard of the Joker's menacing face, which grows larger as the street level falls away. Finally, the camera settles as Batman lands on a ledge directly beside the Joker billboard, overlooking the distant, shimmering lights of the cityscape.
